items.copy: Agentic AI is moving from alert scoring into the AML investigation itself. For credit-union compliance leaders, the operating test is whether every recommendation can be reconstructed: source data, investigative steps, escalation logic, analyst override and final decision. Start narrowly, sample cleared alerts as well as escalations, and keep regulated action behind human approval. https://creditunionainews.com/news/genpact-agentic-ai-aml-investigations.html?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_campaign=cuai_news&utm_content=linkedin-genpact-agentic-ai-aml-investigations-2026-07-24

Communication Federal Credit Union has moved AI credit decisioning from selection into production. The operational takeaway for lending leaders is to separate vendor forecasts from realized results and start measuring approval and pricing outcomes, adverse-action reasons, overrides, early delinquency and model drift at go-live. https://creditunionainews.com/news/communication-fcu-scienaptic-ai-lending.html?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_campaign=cuai_news&utm_content=linkedin-communication-fcu-scienaptic-ai-lending-2026-07-23

The most useful detail in Bank of America’s EricaAssist upgrade is not the model. It is the placement: AI assembles guidance inside the service employee’s workflow while the employee remains responsible for the conversation. For credit-union contact centers, that suggests a practical sequence—start with approved-source retrieval and next-step prompts, measure accuracy and repeat contacts alongside speed, and keep account changes behind existing approvals. What evidence would your team require before putting real-time AI guidance beside frontline staff? https://creditunionainews.com/news/bank-of-america-ericaassist-generative-ai.html

note: Beginning after trackingPolicyEffectiveAt, every queued LinkedIn item must keep articleUrl canonical, include a UTM-tagged distributionUrl, use distributionUrl in copy, and pass the tracked production scheduler. The July 22 post is retained as an explicitly untagged timing baseline.
